headline: For Beverage Chains, a Market Edge Is Key. How Dutch Bros and Starbucks Stack Up.
summary: Dutch Bros is building clusters of stores in existing markets while Starbucks is trying to regain strength with new menu items.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 We Avoid
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

raw.headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 We Avoid
raw.summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: Alshaya Group takes over Starbucks operations in Greece and Cyprus
summary: The business will operate as Alshaya Hellas SMSA in Greece and Murgab Cyprus in Cyprus.

raw.headline: Alshaya Group takes over Starbucks operations in Greece and Cyprus
raw.summary: The business will operate as Alshaya Hellas SMSA in Greece and Murgab Cyprus in Cyprus.

headline: Co-op Group and Southern Co-op propose merger to form enlarged society
summary: If the proposal proceeds, around 300,000 Southern Co-op members would join the Co-op Group’s existing membership base of approximately seven million.

raw.headline: Co-op Group and Southern Co-op propose merger to form enlarged society

headline: As millions lose weight on GLP-1s, they're starting to turn to retailers to refresh their wardrobes
summary: Apparel retailers could see an up to $13 billion annual boost in spending because of GLP-1 drugs, according to an estimate by equity research firm Bernstein.

raw.headline: As millions lose weight on GLP-1s, they're starting to turn to retailers to refresh their wardrobes

headline: Starbucks debuts a new drink to take on energy brands
summary: Starbucks has spent decades owning the morning. Now it wants the afternoon, too. The company launched its new Energy Refreshers in U.S. coffeehouses on April 7, a boosted version of its existing Refreshers line that adds extra caffeine from natural sources and B vitamins. The launch is part of a ...
